text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard Narita Brian tries, she can't
envision winning against Symboli Rudolf. She
continues to struggle through this darkness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reveals everything on her mind, and I answer
her with an unwavering faith that she can win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing that, Narita Brian regains
composure. She seems to remember that I've
always believed in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, at a press conference before the Japan
Cup, Narita Brian announces her intention to
defeat the Emperor, and gives Symboli Rudolf a
firm handshake.
